1. IntroductionDobroGames ("we", "us") develops and publishes games and apps for the Internet and mobile devices. Our Privacy Policy (the "Policy"), explains how we collect, store, use and share your Personal Information, referring to information that personally identifies you, such as name, address, phone number or email address. Our Policy extends to all users and others who access the mobile app.2.

User DataWe don't collect or store User Data.The information, we processed while you visit, download or update our Games and Apps is limited to the following data that doesn't personally identify you, but can uniquely identify the using devic

e. User Data can be obtained only by the user consent for us and only for the purposes where permission was granted.The information may be used by us to personalize advertising, display weather, etc. In some countries, these data can be considered as a Personal Information, including:Аdvertising ID is a unique identifier associated with your mobile phone or tablet, which advertisers use to track advertising.

Location information is a general information about the location of the device which using our apps and games (for example, IP address, country and city).Device Information is a technical information about your mobile device, such as your device ID, operating system information, network information, the brand and manufacturer of your device, localization, the your operator's name and the installed app version or game on your device.Photographs and video produced using the device's camera;

Audio data received using the device's microphone.The location information, photographs, video and audio data can be obtained only at the user's permission in the app. We may use the Personal and Confidential Information provided by you to:help us develop and improve our Products, and provide higher quality Services;personalize the supplying content and information, which may include online advertising and marketing;to estimate the our services effectiveness;resolve technical issue;
electronic communication with you.Users may ask us not to use Personal and Confidential Information for marketing purposes.3.

heading_content_part: Providing information to Third PartiesWe don't give or share your User Data with Third Parties. In some cases, we can share your User Data at your request or on the law basis of statutory acts:your prior authorization;current legislation within or outside your country of residence, the trial, requests the courts;requests for public and governmental bodies;protection of our legitimate rights and interests.4.

Use of User Data by Partners
Us
heading_content_part: We ask our Partners and Service Providers to treat your User Data as Personal and Confidential Information and use it only for those Services that are specified in the contract with us. However, we can't guarantee that our Partners and Service Providers will use your data as required in our contract with them and aren't responsible for the misuse of your User Data.5.

Personal Information about ChildrenWe adhere to the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA) and the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and we don't collect children's information.6.
